biography: Eero is a golfer of considerable renown, although his reserved nature keeps him somewhat out of the limelight. He is known to be a man of few words, preferring to let his clubs do the talking. A formidable competitor, Eero has graced the fairways of the Hector Trophée on one occasion.

While the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded Eero's grasp, and he has never managed to win the Victor Trophy either, his presence at the tournament is always anticipated. His strategic mind and unwavering focus make him a challenging opponent in any format. Although he is considered retired from the Hector Trophée, fans are still hoping for a surprise appearance in the future.
